title: Building H2O
input_format: A string of H and O characters representing arriving atoms
output_format: Grouped output where every 3 chars form a valid H2O molecule (2 Hs and 1 O)
constraints: Input length is always divisible by 3, with exactly 2x Hs as Os
function_signature: class H2O { hydrogen(releaseHydrogen: () => void): Promise<void>; oxygen(releaseOxygen: () => void): Promise<void> }
